case_title: JAMES THOMAS MORRIS et al VS. JUDITH LEWIS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2008 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GHILZAI, HUMAIRA AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, JUDITH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES PRESENT. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORRIS, JAMES THOMAS GHILZAI, HUMAIRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, JUDITH $351.98 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $391.98 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,372.35 FILED BY MORRIS, JAMES THOMAS GHILZAI, HUMAIRA AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, JUDITH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
